summary: Comprehensive testing of Blogs 4 Blocks new features: Image upload system, WebSocket real-time comments, and email notifications. All major functionality working correctly with minor UI warnings.

design_issues.issue: TipTap editor shows duplicate extension warnings for 'link' and 'underline'
Occasional WebSocket connection failure message on initial load, but recovers immediately

passed_tests: Homepage displays cover images on blog cards
Write page cover image upload area functionality
Rich text editor image upload button
Post detail page cover image display
WebSocket live indicator and real-time updates
Guest vs logged-in user UI differences
action_item_for_main_agent: Optional minor fixes: Remove duplicate TipTap extensions to eliminate console warnings. All core functionality is working correctly.
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (8/8 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (all major features working, minor warnings only)
